title: Token Theme
description: A named branding token theme that can be selected on pages and global settings

name.title: Theme Name
name.description: Human-readable name shown in the theme picker (e.g. 'Dark Mode', 'Brand Neon')

tokens.title: Token Configuration (JSON)
tokens.description: Structured branding token JSON — managed by the Design Tokens Editor, do not edit manually

css.title: Generated CSS
css.description: Auto-generated CSS custom properties — computed from tokens JSON on save, revalidated on deploy

system.title: System Theme
system.description: Marks this theme as system-managed. System themes are synced from the Design System and cannot be modified or deleted by users.
